meta.name: CBMAA PH 2
meta.subtitle: BAS Retrofit
meta.label: ES2 · Crystal Bridges Museum BAS Retrofit

items.issue: Fixed DP setpoint (6 PSI) causes over/under-flow depending on number of active CT cells.
items.action: Update BAS program with 3 separate DP setpoints tied to number of active cooling tower cells.

items.issue: Fixed DP setpoint (8 PSI) causes over/under-flow with chiller/cell staging.
items.action: Update BAS program with staged DP setpoints based on active chiller/CT cell count.

items.issue: Condenser water supply flow meter reads ~200 GPM low vs. accurate return meter.
items.action: Calibrate supply-side flow meter. Verify BAS staging/efficiency logic uses corrected value.

items.issue: Condenser water supply flow meter reads ~200 GPM low vs. accurate return meter.
items.action: Calibrate supply-side flow meter. Verify BAS staging/efficiency logic uses corrected value.

items.issue: CHW supply meter ~400 GPM low; return meter ~500 GPM low. Both inaccurate.
items.action: Calibrate both CHW flow meters. Audit any BAS logic dependent on these readings.

items.issue: EBTRON gains applied: Return 0.54 / OSA 0.93 / Exhaust 1.20
items.action: Confirm BAS is receiving accurate post-calibration readings. Validate airflow alarms/setpoints.

items.issue: EBTRON gains applied: Return 1.06 / OSA 1.25 / Exhaust 0.86
items.action: Confirm BAS readings post-calibration. Validate airflow alarms/setpoints.

items.issue: EBTRON gains applied: Return 1.35 / OSA 1.14 / Exhaust 1.16. Supply grilles only total 1,475 of 2,600 CFM design.
items.action: Confirm BAS readings post-calibration. Review ERU supply airflow setpoint — installed condition differs from design.

items.issue: EBTRON gains applied: Return 0.91 / OSA 0.89 / Exhaust 0.85
items.action: Confirm BAS readings post-calibration. Validate airflow alarms/setpoints.

items.issue: EBTRON gains applied: Return 0.93 / OSA 1.90 / Exhaust 1.00. OSA gain is notably high.
items.action: Spot-check OSA reading in WebCTRL — 1.90 gain is significant. Validate post-cal airflow values.

items.issue: EBTRON gains applied: Return 0.91 / OSA 1.23 / Exhaust 1.03
items.action: Confirm BAS readings post-calibration. Validate airflow alarms/setpoints.

items.issue: EBTRON gains applied: Return 0.98 / OSA 1.54 / Exhaust 1.35. OSA gain elevated.
items.action: Spot-check OSA reading in WebCTRL. Validate post-cal airflow values.

items.issue: Unit short of design CFM at high speed (741 vel grid / 815 pitot). Both below design.
items.action: Check BAS for min airflow alarms on this unit. Coordinate with mechanical on root cause.

items.issue: Supply grilles total 1,475 CFM vs. 2,600 CFM design. TAB set return/exhaust to match offset.
items.action: Review ERU-A7-03 supply airflow setpoint in BAS — adjust to reflect installed airflow if needed.

items.issue: Duct to grille #2 deleted. Design CFM reduced from 500 → 250 CFM for that outlet.
items.action: Update VAV-A9-18 zone setpoints in BAS to reflect reduced design CFM for grille #2.

items.issue: One supply grille in area 9-204 deleted. 300 CFM redistributed to 4 remaining grilles.
items.action: Verify zone setpoint for VAV-A9-20 still matches total design CFM. Update if needed.

items.issue: Return grilles sized for 3,200 CFM but unit design return is 2,650 CFM. Grilles will read low.
items.action: No BAS action needed. Note in as-builts to prevent future misdiagnosis of 'low return' condition.

items.issue: Unit running at 80% with filter removed. Two motors installed on unit.
items.action: Note in BAS asset data if runtime/maintenance tracking is active on this unit.

meta.name: Alice Walton School of Medicine
meta.subtitle: Bentonville
meta.label: AWSOM · Alice Walton School of Medicine — Bentonville

items.issue: Fan designed to modulate on building pressure but ran at 100% during TAB. Modulation sequence not yet commissioned.
items.action: Complete BAS modulation setup for RF-02. Once active, cap Max VFD speed at 70% per TAB directive.

items.issue: Fan rated to operate at 67 Hz. TAB found VFD running at 53 Hz — delivering 22,185 CFM vs. 22,500 CFM design.
items.action: Verify BAS VFD frequency cap for EF-01. Raise upper limit to 67 Hz if BAS is restricting output.

items.issue: Fan rated to operate at 67 Hz. TAB found VFD running at 53 Hz — delivering 22,220 CFM vs. 22,500 CFM design.
items.action: Verify BAS VFD frequency cap for EF-02. Raise upper limit to 67 Hz if BAS is restricting output.

items.issue: Fan at 100% but cannot achieve design airflow to duct trunk serving grilles 26–31. Likely mechanical obstruction.
items.action: Flag in BAS asset notes. If airflow tracking/alarms exist on EF-04, expect shortfall on that trunk until mechanical issue is resolved.

items.issue: Return fan set to maintain 0.75" suction pressure. Design TSP 1.7", ESP 1.2".
items.action: Confirm 0.75" suction pressure setpoint is active and correct in BAS return fan control loop.

items.issue: TAB documented SP reset range: 1.0–1.5".
items.action: Confirm BAS static pressure reset setpoint range matches 1.0–1.5" for AHU-01-S.

items.issue: TAB documented SP reset range: 1.0–1.5".
items.action: Confirm BAS static pressure reset setpoint range matches 1.0–1.5" for AHU-02.

items.issue: TAB documented SP reset range: 1.0–2.0" (wider than other AHUs).
items.action: Confirm BAS static pressure reset setpoint range matches 1.0–2.0" for AHU-03.

items.issue: TAB documented SP reset range: 1.0–1.5". Min OSA: 10,350 CFM.
items.action: Confirm BAS SP reset range matches 1.0–1.5" and minimum OSA setpoint is 10,350 CFM for AHU-05.

items.issue: ERU exhaust fan set to maintain 0.60" duct static. Exhaust fan rated 25,000 CFM; heat wheel exhaust 11,250 CFM / OSA 11,250 CFM.
items.action: Verify 0.60" exhaust duct static setpoint is programmed in BAS for AHU-01-WA exhaust fan.

items.issue: ERU exhaust fan set to maintain 0.60" duct static. Exhaust fan rated 18,000 CFM; heat wheel exhaust 8,100 CFM / OSA 8,900 CFM.
items.action: Verify 0.60" exhaust duct static setpoint is programmed in BAS for AHU-04-WA exhaust fan.

items.issue: TAB recorded CHW DP sensor readings at multiple staging conditions: 8 PSI (2 pumps/CH-1 only), 22 PSI (4 pumps/both chillers), 9 PSI (4 pumps/CH-1 only).
items.action: Verify BAS CHW DP control setpoints and pump staging logic align with these observed operating bands.

items.issue: BAS controlling heat recovery side to 6 PSI chiller DP per manufacturer recommendation.
items.action: Verify 6 PSI chiller DP setpoint is active and correctly programmed for CH-01 heat recovery side.

items.issue: BAS controlling CHW pumps via system DP and bypass valve to maintain 3 PSI minimum chiller DP for flow protection.
items.action: Verify CHW bypass control logic is functioning. Confirm 3 PSI minimum DP setpoint is correct for both chillers.

items.issue: Plans showed 11 grilles but only 9 installed. TAB reduced design max airflow from 2,080 → 1,700 CFM.
items.action: Update VAV-2-24 max cooling CFM setpoint in BAS from 2,080 to 1,700 CFM.

items.issue: Installed grilles only total 340 CFM vs. VAV box design of 380 CFM. TAB set box to 340 CFM actual.
items.action: Confirm BAS max cooling setpoint for VAV-2-17 is set to 340 CFM, not 380 CFM.

items.issue: Controls contractor confirmed cooling only — no heating capability. HW coil/valve present but heating disabled per controls.
items.action: Confirm BAS is not attempting to enable heating on FCU-12 and not generating heating failure alarms.

items.issue: BAS LAT limit confirmed at 85°F for all VAV heating by TAB.
items.action: No change needed. Document as TAB-confirmed. Verify BAS limit is 85°F if audited.

items.issue: Fan inaccessible at installed location. Motor RPM and full data could not be verified by TAB.
items.action: Note in BAS asset records. Monitor for runtime faults. Flag for physical access resolution.

items.issue: AHU-1/2 installation pending.
items.action: Complete AHU-1/2 installation.

items.issue: VAV 1–5 installation pending.
items.action: Complete VAV 1–5 installation.

items.issue: FCU installation pending.
items.action: Complete FCU installation.

items.issue: Devices installed but not yet commissioned.
items.action: Commission all installed devices. Verify BAS points and operation.

items.issue: 4 control panel squares missing identification stickers.
items.action: Apply stickers to all 4 squares.

items.issue: Modbus integration requirements for CAT generator not confirmed.
items.action: Email stakeholders regarding CAT GEN Modbus integration scope and requirements.

items.issue: Mixed air temperature (MAT) sensor or sequence not yet verified in BAS.
items.action: Verify AHU-2 MAT sensor reading and confirm correct use in economizer/mixing logic.

items.issue: Phase 2 scope and FLW/bathroom IP addressing not confirmed with team.
items.action: Email team regarding Phase 2 plan and FLW/bathroom IP address coordination.

items.issue: Trail bathroom controls due for recontrol.
items.action: Complete trail bathroom recontrol. Verify BAS points after.

items.issue: FLW House controls due for recontrol.
items.action: Complete FLW House recontrol.

items.issue: FLW House IP connectivity not yet tested post-recontrol.
items.action: Run IP test on FLW House after recontrol. Confirm BAS communication.

items.issue: FLW House programming and graphics not yet complete.
items.action: Complete BAS programming and graphics for FLW House.

items.issue: Phase 2 proof documents need review.
items.action: Review Phase 2 proof. Flag any discrepancies or required changes.

items.issue: CRAC unit lead/lag logic not yet programmed.
items.action: Program and test lead/lag staging logic for CRAC units in BAS.

items.issue: FCU-E2 reported faulty — needs repair.
items.action: Repair FCU-E2. Verify normal operation and BAS point restoration after.

items.issue: Two CHW plant controllers exist (PXCM16 and PNL23). Functional differences unknown. Affects Phase 4 and 9 scope.
items.action: Investigate how PXCM16 and PNL23 differ. Document findings and mend Phase 4/9 plans as needed.

items.issue: AHU-4 thermostats believed to be located in the vault — not yet confirmed.
items.action: Locate AHU-4 TSTATs in the vault. Document location for future access.

items.issue: AHU-3/4 control panel wiring labels are incorrect or missing.
items.action: Relabel all wires in AHU-3/4 panel to match as-built documentation.

items.issue: Flow meters on AHU-7 and AHU-8 not yet configured in BAS.
items.action: Configure AHU-7 and AHU-8 flow meters in BAS. Verify readings against design.

items.issue: Engineering graphics not yet received.
items.action: Ping engineering team for graphics deliverables. Set follow-up deadline.

items.issue: Office VAV recontrol scope has no organized plan of action.
items.action: Develop and document a plan of action for office VAV recontrol sequence.
